zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Bassett II於1155年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Ralph Bassett I25歲，母親Alice Peverel20歲。他於1190年與Isabelle of Tamworth在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1211年在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年56歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Bassett II was born in 1155, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Bassett I, was 25 and his mother, Alice Peverel, was 20. He married Isabelle of Tamworth in 1190, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1211, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Bassett II est né en 1155, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Bassett I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Peverel, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle of Tamworth en 1190, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1211, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Bassett II 1155 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Bassett I 25 und seine Mutter Alice Peverel 20. Er hat 1190 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Isabelle of Tamworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Bassett II è nato il nel 1155 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Bassett I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Peverel, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle of Tamworth nel 1190, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1211, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IIが1155年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassett Iは25歳，母Alice Peverelは20歳であった。1190年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでIsabelle of Tamworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1211年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで56歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett II(이)가 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Bassett I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Peverel(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Isabelle of Tamworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1211년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Bassett II родился в 1155 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Bassett I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Peverel, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle of Tamworth в 1190 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1211 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия.
